creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Jul 10 12:08:05 2013
New Revision: 322676
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322676

Log:
  www/awstats: update to 7.2
  
  - Update to 7.2 [1]
  - Remove unnecessary LICENSE_FILE
  - Add DOCS to options
  
  PR:		ports/180427
  Submitted by:	Alex Samorukov <samm os2.kiev.ua> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/awstats/Makefile
  head/www/awstats/distinfo

Modified: head/www/awstats/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/awstats/Makefile	Wed Jul 10 12:00:04 2013	(r322675)
+++ head/www/awstats/Makefile	Wed Jul 10 12:08:05 2013	(r322676)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	awstats
-PORTVERSION=	7.1.1
+PORTVERSION=	7.2
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/AWStats/${PORTVERSION}
@@ -11,7 +11,6 @@ MAINTAINER=	samm@os2.kiev.ua
 COMMENT=	Free real-time logfile analyzer to get advanced web statistics
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
-LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/docs/LICENSE.TXT
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Net-XWhois>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-XWhois
 
@@ -32,7 +31,7 @@ USE_DOS2UNIX=	tools/*.pl \
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	IPV6
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS IPV6
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 

Modified: head/www/awstats/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/awstats/distinfo	Wed Jul 10 12:00:04 2013	(r322675)
+++ head/www/awstats/distinfo	Wed Jul 10 12:08:05 2013	(r322676)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (awstats-7.1.1.tar.gz) = b0051595a38b8b7776f553f20e431760d306bbad1a9e83cf2aca52ef0205f2c0
-SIZE (awstats-7.1.1.tar.gz) = 1261038
+SHA256 (awstats-7.2.tar.gz) = 740cb46ac5a7befb72ff0b80d0e53c6fe3560700208bce18f4fb5b2b5e275791
+SIZE (awstats-7.2.tar.gz) = 1274635
